hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlift and metcon tax posterior chain and shoulders; accessory work targets antagonists and weak points.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 500/400m row, 50 Double Unders, 25 Wall Balls, 10 HSPU or Box HPSU, 5 Deadlifts @ 120/80kg. For hypertrophy, focus on biceps, rear delts, upper back.
